items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Oil futures rise after U.S., Iran trade fire; stock futures quiet after court rejects Trump’s tariffs
items.summary: Oil futures moved higher late Thursday while stock-index futures were little changed after the U.S. and Iran exchanged fire in the Persian Gulf, and after a federal court struck down President Donald Trump’s backup tariff plan.
